commit.message:
Mute Howler during replay to eliminate sound echo

Added replayMode flag that suppresses Howler play() calls while
replay is active. Only playAtRate() (HTML5 Audio) produces sound
during replay, preventing any dual-output echo from Howler and
HTML5 Audio firing simultaneously.

commit.message:
Fix render loop deadlock: setInterval animations + TaskQueue watchdog

Root cause: requestAnimationFrame animation callbacks calling
source.setData() overlap with MapLibre's rAF render cycle, causing
TaskQueue.run() re-entrance that leaves _currentlyRunning stuck true,
permanently freezing the render loop (tiles disappear, map frozen).

Three-part fix:
1. Switch bus/traffic animation from requestAnimationFrame to
   setInterval(67ms) — runs in a separate macrotask, can never
   overlap with MapLibre's rAF-based render
2. Monkey-patch _renderTaskQueue.run() with try-catch to clear
   stuck _currentlyRunning state if a task throws
3. Add 2s render watchdog that detects stuck TaskQueue and
   auto-clears it, triggering a repaint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v9.2: Fix router + rich intelligence narrative + frontend upgrade

- Router: Filter out placeholder API keys (PENDING, NONE, etc.) to prevent
  wasted time on failed auth attempts. Only real keys >20 chars accepted.
- Router: Add _is_valid_api_key() validator used in all provider detection.
- Swarm: Reduce agent spacing from 5s to 4s (still safe for Gemini 15 RPM).
- API: Add _build_narrative() for rich intelligence synthesis from agent results.
- API: Map BUY→LONG, SELL→SHORT in signal.direction for frontend compat.
- API: Include consensus text, top_findings, and what_happened/why_it_matters.
- API: Health endpoint no longer exposes model names — shows capabilities instead.
- Frontend: Properly parse real swarm results (direction, conviction, narrative).
- Frontend: Show bullish/bearish/neutral agent split in signal card.
- Frontend: Display consensus text, key findings from top agents.
- Frontend: Proper error handling instead of fake 87% conviction fallback.
- Frontend: 6 commodity chips for quick testing.
- Frontend: Version bump to v9.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add C# reflection-based decomposition strategy (#18)

* Add C# reflection-based decomposition strategy

Three-phase feature for function-level C# code generation:

Phase 1 - Reflection Scanner:
- .NET console app (tools/dotnet-reflector/) using MetadataLoadContext
  to extract type metadata from assemblies without execution
- Python tool wrapper (backend/tools/dotnet_reflection.py) with
  build, reflect, and format_type_map functions
- Registered in ToolRegistry (conditional on dotnet CLI availability)

Phase 2 - C# Planner Prompt:
- New decomposition_strategy "csharp_reflection" in project config
- Planner runs reflection, injects type map into planning prompt
- Claude generates method-level tasks with typed contracts
  (target_signature, available_methods, constructor_params)
- Falls back to generic planner if reflection fails

Phase 3 - Worker Prompt + Assembly:
- WorkerInstruction XML prompt in claude_agent.py for csharp_method
  tasks — constrains AI to output only the method body
- Decomposer injects C# context fields and auto-creates assembly
  tasks (one per class, depends on all method tasks)
- Build verification via dotnet build in task_lifecycle.py

40 new tests across 4 test files. 779 total passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add Feishu bot channel adapter for remote messaging

- Add channel abstraction layer (ChannelAdapter base, ChannelManager)
- Implement Feishu bot adapter with WSClient long connection
- Support P2P and group chat messaging via Gateway WebSocket
- Text-based command interaction (no card callbacks with WSClient)
- Streaming response with throttled message updates
- Bot menu support with pendingSelectionByOpenId transfer

- Auto-approve permission requests, handle question forwarding

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(feishu): show error state in reply when session ends with error

When a message completes with an error, the Feishu reply card now
displays the error message instead of silently ignoring it. Also
cleaned up redundant ternary expression in group chat validation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(claude): resolve wrong working directory and exit code 1

Two critical fixes for the Claude engine:

1. ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE leak: delete from env in both fetchModels()
   and getOrCreateV2Session() to prevent CLI subprocess crash.

2. Wrong cwd: The V2 SDK (unstable_v2_createSession) does not pass
   `cwd` to its internal ProcessTransport, so all Claude CLI
   subprocesses inherited the Electron main process's cwd instead of
   the user's project directory. Fixed via patch-package to add
   `cwd:Q.cwd` to the SessionImpl→ProcessTransport constructor call.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(session): per-engine incremental session loading with placeholder

Instead of waiting for all engines to finish loading before showing
sessions, each engine's results now merge into the sidebar
incrementally as they arrive. A loading spinner placeholder is shown
for engines still in progress.

Changes:
- Add loadingEngines field to session store
- Refactor Phase 2 init to per-engine Promise.allSettled with
  individual merge callbacks
- Add loading placeholder in SessionSidebar empty state
- Add loadingSessions i18n keys (en/zh)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(copilot): use real event timestamps for history replay

convertEventsToMessages() was using Date.now() for all timestamps,
causing all history messages to show as "just now" with tool durations
of 0ms. Now parses event.timestamp (ISO 8601) from each SessionEvent
for accurate time display.

Also adds graceful fallback in ensureActiveSession(): when
resumeSession() fails due to corrupted JSONL (e.g. Zod schema
validation errors), creates a fresh session in the same directory
instead of throwing.

commit.message:
Add Spotify playcount sync endpoint using Partner API

Syncs real Spotify play counts by querying the Partner GraphQL API
with tokens from the web player. Writes estimated total streams
(Spotify / 0.60) to Notion so per-platform distribution is accurate.

Also wrote 36 Spotify links and real play counts for all 40 released
songs to Notion (5.67M total Spotify plays, 9.45M estimated total).

cache-bust parameter.

commit.message:
fix: prevent cross-tab name contamination and fix waiting status

State aggregation was session-wide, mixing panes from all tabs. Combined
with rename-tab targeting the focused tab (not the calling pane's tab),
hooks from one tab would overwrite another tab's name and icon.

- Scope state aggregation by original tab name so only same-tab panes
  are considered
- Guard rename-tab behind a focused-tab check to prevent cross-tab writes
- Clean up orphaned state files from dead panes during cleanup
- Add precmd hook to restore tab names deferred by non-focused cleanup
- Fix install.sh /dev/tty errors in non-interactive environments
